title: tragopogon jesdianus
intro: Tragopogon jesdianus, also known as the Oriental sowthistle or Jerusalem artichoke, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which help to treat conditions such as rheumatism and edema. The health benefits of Tragopogon jesdianus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some parts of the world as a food ingredient, similar to its cousin, the Jerusalem artichoke.
